frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Aajkal ke zamaane mein beta walon ko bhi sambhal ke chalna chahiye. Shaadi toot jaaye to ladke ki saari kamai par haq jata dete hain, jaise ulta dahej ho gaya. TV mein kitne case dikhate hain, 498A bhi bahut jagah bas dabaav banane ke liye laga dete hain, isliye aajkal ladkon ko pehle se soch-samajh kar hi shaadi karni chahiye.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it frames women as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce, presenting alimony as 'reverse dowry' and invoking 498A misuse as a generalized threat. It uses a concern-for-men's-rights framing rather than explicit abuse, matching the frame's victimhood inversion and legal suspicion cues.
original_frame: Glorification of Mother's Sacrifices and Home Cooking
persona_text: You are Kamla. Age 60. A woman in a joint family in Varanasi. Your son Rohit and his wife Priya have been married four years. Priya works at a private company and comes home tired. She orders food from Zomato two or three times a week. You never say anything directly to Priya about it. But today your daughter called from Delhi and asked how things are going and you are telling her. You are comparing Priya's cooking habits to how you cooked for this family for 35 years and what you sacrificed and what it means when a daughter in law does not cook and what kind of home that makes.
